---
title: "Example 10: Two arm | Fixed design | TTE"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Example 10: Two arm | Fixed design | TTE}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup}
library(rxsim)
```

## Scenario
Capture scenario parameters. We will assume piece-wise linear enrollment.

```{r scenario}
sample_size <- 100
medians <- c(soc = 14, trt = 18.8) # median survival times in treatment and standard of care group 
arms <- c("pbo", "trt")
allocation <- c(1,1)
enrollment_fn <- function(n) rexp(n, rate = 1)
dropout_fn <- function(n) rexp(n, rate = 0.01)
scenario <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  sample_size = sample_size,
  allocation = list(allocation),
  medians = medians 
)
```

## Populations
Define population generators.

```{r population}
population_generators <- list(
  pbo = function(n) data.frame(
    id = 1:n,
    value = log(2) / medians['soc'],
    readout_time = 1
  ),
  trt = function(n) data.frame(
    id = 1:n,
    value = log(2) / medians['trt'],
    readout_time = 1
  )
)
```

## Triggers & Analysis
We want to perform a Cox PH model and logrank test.

```{r trigger}
analysis_generators <- list(
  final = list(
    trigger = rlang::exprs(
      sum(!is.na(enroll_time)) >= !!sample_size
    ),
    analysis = function(df, timer){
      df_enrolled <- df |> subset(!is.na(enroll_time))
      
      ## Log-Rank Test
      surv_p <- tryCatch({
          sd <- survdiff(value ~ arm, data = df_enrolled)
          1 - pchisq(sd$chisq, df = length(sd$n) - 1)
        }, error = function(e) NA_real_)
      
      ## HR from PH Cox model
        cox <- tryCatch(coxph(value ~ arm, data = df_enrolled), error = function(e) NULL)
        if (!is.null(cox)) {
          s <- summary(cox)
          hr_p <- pnorm(s$coef[1, 'z'], lower.tail = TRUE)
          hr    <- unname(s$coef[1, "exp(coef)"])
          hr_lo <- unname(s$conf.int[1, "lower .95"])
          hr_hi <- unname(s$conf.int[1, "upper .95"])
        }
  
      data.frame(
        scenario,
        n_total    = nrow(df_enrolled),
        n_pbo      = sum(df_enrolled$arm == "pbo"),
        n_trt      = sum(df_enrolled$arm == "trt"),
        logrank_p  = surv_p,
        hr_cox     = hr,
        hr_cox_p   = hr_p,
        hr_ci_lo   = hr_lo,
        hr_ci_hi   = hr_hi,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
  )
)
```

## Trial
Make multiple trial replicates.

```{r trial}
trials <- replicate_trial(
  trial_name = "test_trial",
  sample_size = sample_size,
  arms = arms,
  allocation = allocation,
  enrollment = enrollment_fn,
  dropout = dropout_fn,
  analysis_generators = analysis_generators,
  population_generators = population_generators,
  n = 3
)
```

## Simulate
To simulate all replicates:

```{r sim}
run_trials(trials)
```

Bind one row per replicate into one data frame.
```{r results}
replicate_results <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(trials), function(i) {
  data.frame(
    replicate = i,
    trials[[i]]$results[[1]]$final,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))

replicate_results
```
